name: vol_within_range_no_clamp
description: symphony_vol (1.5) is within [MIN=0.4, MAX=3.0]. dynamic_activation = 1.5 (passes through unclamped). With current_return = 1.4 (above activation - DEADBAND = 1.3), ticks increment.
derivation: dynamic_activation = max(0.4, min(3.0, 1.5)) = max(0.4, 1.5) = 1.5 (pass-through). threshold = 1.5 - 0.2 = 1.3. current_return (1.4) >= 1.3 -> ticks++ -> 1 + 1 = 2. 2 < 5 -> not locked. not locked -> stop = base_stop_level = 0.5. Catches an impl that always clamped (would produce wrong threshold) or that incremented by != 1.
